content:
Recently, me and a few of my peers have been working on a Youtube channel. The channel is educational and entertaining. As of right now, we post film studies and discussions, podcasts, and recorded fiction readings. Over the next couple of months, the hope is to involve more original content. I’ve produced a recent hip hop album, and a few other albums over the past few years. I have to current spec scripts. And will produce a sitcom for my youtube channel.

Can you offer me some general advice regarding moving, places to apply to, which positions might be the best to get a foot in the door through? I’m wondering whether or not to stay put where I am, find local work to build up my resume and skill set, before trying to make the move? Does it make sense to get any job, be it assistant, mailroom, editing, whatever I can do to just get any job in the industry? I’m also able to teach, so I’m wondering how that could play into it. Maybe make the move, and try and get a teaching job.

Either way, I’m just looking for general guidance. Cheap places to live in LA. I’m trying to formulate a game plane and create some goals to set for myself. I want to make money as a writer, and work in a writer’s room. I want to be able to create content cheaply. With a small crew.
context: From document: It doesn’t happen often, but it was nice seeing you for the birthday… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
